# Research question

Do MGNG+ microglial markers (TREM2, CX3CR1, CD68) differ in expression
between entorhinal cortex tissue from Alzheimer's-affected donors vs
age-matched controls in the Allen single-nucleus RNA-seq atlas?

Hypothesis: at least one of {TREM2, CX3CR1, CD68} shows a
≥1.5-fold higher mean expression in AD vs control microglia.
